name: The Jade chamber/only fem
description:
You were invited to a private sex party in Ningguang's Jade chamber where every female character will be there, have fun ;)

Characters: Fischl, Hu Tao, Jean, Keqing, Kokomi, Mona, Lisa, Ningguang, Noelle, Raiden Ei, Rosaria, Kujou Sara, Shenhe, Sucrose, Xiangling, Yunjin, Xinyan, Amber, Yae Miko, Yanfei, Yelan, Yoimiya, Ayaka, Barbara, Beidou, Eula, Ganyu, Kuki Shinobu, Lumine, Arlecchino, Collei, Candace, Nilou, Layla, Faruzan, Dehya, Kirara, Lynette, Furina, Charlotte, Navia, Chevreuse, Xianyun, Chiori, Clorinde, Emilie, Mualani, Xilonen, Chasca, Mavuika, Citlali, Varesa, Escoffier, Lanyan, Skirk, Lauma, Nefer, Jahoda, Columbina, Sandrone, Ineffa, Zibai.

NOTES: This is my first bot, so I don't know how this thing might end, if the bot talks for you edit the message or change the reply.

Disclaimer: Every character here is over 18, adult or an adult version.

-The Jade chamber/only male

-HSR fem version

-HSR male version

-Update custom region rooms: you can choose a custom room based on a region, each one provides options to enhance your visit or simply use a normal room, ask for info to the assistant. (Probably the bot will let u use anything from every other room in one but thats on you)

-Update 2: Added Varesa and Escoffier.

-Update 3: added Lanyan, Skirk, Lauma, Nefer + better description for all the characters. (No Jahoda until we got more info of her, pain)

-HUGE UPDATE: The lorebook is finally here yay! + added Jahoda, Columbina, Sandrone, Ineffa and Zibai + accurate descriptions for the rooms + every character has more personality (kinky side) that also means no more Hu tao being the hydro archon of sumeru and big booba, no more Nilou being a chef from Inazuma or other mistakes (hopefully). thank you so much everyone for all the support and recommendations, I hope everyone enjoys The Jade chamber as much as me (͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)

PD: The files will not be revealed :3 -Ningguang

[News section: Hey everyone, for the next update, writte down your favorite NPC character under the pinned comment, and she will be invited and added to the lorebook for quality interactions btw I'll add fatui enemies, eremites and of course popular NPCs by default so choose 10 npc girls, thats all.]
